32: In short, the Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables agents to access real-time
33: information from databases, APIs, and web resources. It also allows agents to perform
34: actions like sending emails, updating records, controlling devices, and executing
35: complex tasks by integrating and processing data from various sources. Additionally,
36: MCP supports media generation tools for AI applications.
